meaning: Mountains坎塔布连山脉[西班牙北部]
examples: Female Cantabrian bears with babies and independent young bears under the age of two do not usually hibernate, scientists have found.
The area also has protected species such as the Cantabrian brown bears, woodpeckers as well as unique domestic species.
The coastal cliffs and spectacular abrasion platforms of the Cantabrian Coast are bordered by a mountainous landscape rising to heights of 1000 m.
